title: MEDIUM: Missing security response headers
description: File: server.rs (all handlers). No X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy, Cache-Control, or Content-Security-Policy headers on any HTTP response. Enables MIME sniffing attacks on media, clickjacking on profile/index pages, and URL leakage via Referer. Fix: add an axum middleware layer that sets security headers on all responses.
close_reason: Added security_headers middleware: X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy same-origin, CSP default-src none, Cache-Control no-store.
